Surname.jp: 喧嘩嫌いな【閃撃の会】会長

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52491_0]</color> chance to increase a random ally's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52491_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52491_0]</color> 확률로 무작위 아군 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52491_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52491_0]</color>の確率でランダムの味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52491_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52491_0]</color>的几率使随机1名友军的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52491_0]回合</color>。

name.jp: 徐かなること林の如く

description.en: (Passive Effect) Has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52492_0]</color> chance to reduce the skill cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Like a Noble Mountain</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52492_0] turn(s)</color> upon taking a critical hit.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 치명 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52492_0]</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>고고한 산처럼</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52492_0]턴</color> 감소합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)会心ダメージを受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52492_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【動かざること山の如く】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52492_0]ターン</color>減少させる。
description.zh: (被动效果)受到暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52492_0]</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>傲若孤山</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52492_0]回合</color>。

name.jp: 動かざること山の如く

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> all allies for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52493_0]</color> of Flamberge's Max Health.
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 플랑베르쥬 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52493_0]</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を【フランベルジュ】の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52493_0]</color>回復させる。
description.zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复相当于弗朗贝尔修生命值上限的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52493_0]</color>。
